claim: WHO reports 8 million annual tobacco deaths, 80 percent in LMICs. Only 41 countries have tobacco taxes above 75 percent of retail price. Taxation is the single most effective control measure.

source.title: WHO Report on the Global Tobacco Epidemic 2024

method: Reviewed MPOWER tracking, tax-policy analysis, and country profiles.
limitations: Tax-policy reporting is self-reported by countries.
